Equipment Rentals

Broken Duck Studio members and production clients can rent professional gear through our partner, Green Light Studio. Whether you’re filming interviews, short-form content, or running a multicam shoot — we’ve got high-quality equipment ready to go.

Cameras & Video

  • Sony ZV-E10 (4K Mirrorless) – 600 THB/day
  • Canon EOS R10 (APS-C, 4K60) – 800 THB/day
  • Blackmagic Pocket Cinema Camera 6K – 1,200 THB/day
  • Elgato Cam Link 4K (USB Capture) – 300 THB/day

Microphones & Audio

  • Rode NT1-A (Condenser Mic + Stand) – 400 THB/day
  • Shure SM7B (Dynamic Broadcast Mic) – 700 THB/day
  • Zoom H5 Field Recorder – 400 THB/day
  • Rode Wireless GO II (Lavalier Pair) – 500 THB/day

Teleprompter & Accessories

  • Desview T3 Teleprompter + Remote – 300 THB/day
  • Tablet Mount for Prompter – included with rental
  • Teleprompter App (Green Light Studio Login) – free with rental

Lighting & Grip

  • Godox SL60W (Softbox Kit) – 250 THB/day
  • Yongnuo YN300 III (RGB Panel) – 150 THB/day
  • C-Stand + Boom Arm – 150 THB/day
  • Backdrop Kit (Black/White/Green) – 300 THB/day

Booking & Payment

Rentals are offered by Green Light Studio and available to Broken Duck Studio members or approved collaborators. Gear is inspected before and after each use. Payment must be made in advance.

  • Bank: Bangkok Bank
  • Account Number: 613-0-418665
  • Payment due 2 days before rental
  • No refunds — reschedules only (if available)

Usage Guidelines

Rentals are for use on-site only unless approved in writing. Damage, late return, or improper handling may result in additional charges. We recommend you test all gear with your workflow before recording.

Need Help?

If you need assistance with gear setup or want to include an operator, check out our Production Packages.
